blended.narrative: Donner Ski Ranch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
